nodes.label: @mcss/framework
nodes.description: LLM-optimized CSS framework with 5-layer architecture, design token system, RDFa annotations, validation CLI, and ESLint plugin. Achieves 94.2% first-attempt accuracy with AI code generation.

nodes.label: 5-Layer Cascade Architecture
nodes.description: CSS Cascade Layers enforcing priority: global < layout < component < utility < exception. Higher layers always win regardless of selector specificity.

nodes.label: Design Token System
nodes.description: CSS custom properties for all visual values organized by purpose: color, spacing, typography, border radius, shadow, breakpoints, z-index, transitions, and container widths.

nodes.label: RDFa Annotation System
nodes.description: Semantic metadata annotations using RDFa vocabulary (mcs:v1) requiring typeof, taxonomyLevel, and purpose on every component. Supports hasPart relationships and behavioral data-mcs-* attributes.

nodes.label: Ontological Naming Convention
nodes.description: Naming convention: [prefix]-[block]__[element]--[modifier] where prefix indicates layer (l-, c-, u-) and state is managed via data-state attributes rather than class modifiers.

nodes.label: Golden Rule
nodes.description: Architecture rule: Components (c-*) MUST NOT declare external margins on their root selectors. Enforced by CLI and ESLint plugin.

nodes.label: Semantic Imperative
nodes.description: Every component MUST declare typeof='mcs:Component', taxonomyLevel, and purpose via RDFa annotations. Ensures machine-readable component semantics.

nodes.label: Component Catalog
nodes.description: 23 reusable UI components: 15 atoms (Button, Input, Badge, Avatar, Icon, Label, Spinner, Divider, Text, Link, Image, Checkbox, Toggle, Tooltip, Progress) and 8 molecules (Card, Search Form, Login Form, Alert, Breadcrumb, Pagination, Dropdown, Navigation).

nodes.label: mcss-validate CLI
nodes.description: Command-line validation tool with 10 checks across HTML and CSS domains: well-formedness, RDFa completeness, vocabulary, hasPart relationships, accessibility, magic numbers, ONC compliance, token existence, Golden Rule, and layer integrity.

nodes.label: @mcss/framework ESLint Plugin
nodes.description: ESLint plugin shipping 6 rules: no-magic-numbers, token-defined, golden-rule, onc-compliance, require-rdfa, and require-data-state.

nodes.label: Build Pipeline
nodes.description: PostCSS-based build pipeline: postcss-import for bundling, postcss-preset-env for modern CSS features (nesting, @layer, custom media), cssnano for minification. Compiles to dist/mcss.css and dist/mcss.min.css.

nodes.label: MCSS Framework v1 Design Specification
nodes.description: Design specification document covering package structure, 5-layer architecture, design tokens, RDFa annotations, validation CLI, ESLint plugin, and immutable architecture rules.

nodes.label: MCSS Framework v1 Implementation Plan
nodes.description: Step-by-step implementation plan with 31 tasks covering scaffolding, tokens, layers, components, CLI validators, ESLint rules, tests, and README.

nodes.label: @mcss/framework README
nodes.description: Package README with quick start, 5-layer architecture table, key principles, component library listing, validation CLI usage, and ESLint plugin configuration.

nodes.label: MCSS vs Tailwind Missing Features Analysis
nodes.description: Gap analysis comparing MCSS to Tailwind CSS, documenting missing responsive utilities, image sizing, button/link variants, spacing granularity, and responsive width helpers.
nodes.norm_label: mcss vs tailwind missing features analysis

nodes.label: MCSS Login Page Custom Classes and Styles
nodes.description: Documents custom classes (.login-container, .login-visual, .login-card, .social-row, .social-btn, .login-footer, .forgot-link) created where MCSS lacked suitable equivalents for a login page implementation.
nodes.norm_label: mcss login page custom classes and styles

nodes.label: MCSS Login Page TypeScript Project README
nodes.description: README for a TypeScript login page project using MCSS framework, with email/password fields, password visibility toggle, social login buttons, and responsive form layout.
nodes.norm_label: mcss login page typescript project readme

nodes.label: Layer 1: Global
nodes.description: CSS reset (box-sizing, margin strip, font smoothing) and element defaults using design tokens. Element selectors only; no class selectors allowed.

nodes.label: Layer 2: Layout
nodes.description: l-* positioning classes: l-container, l-grid, l-stack, l-center, l-cluster, l-switcher, l-sidebar. Controls positioning and spacing between components; never styles component internals.

nodes.label: Layer 3: Component
nodes.description: Aggregates all 15 atom and 8 molecule c-* components via @import. Components follow ONC naming, Golden Rule (no external margins), and data-state for state management.

nodes.label: Layer 4: Utility
nodes.description: Auto-generated u-* single-property override classes from token-schema.json. All rules use !important; immutable after generation.

nodes.label: Layer 5: Exception
nodes.description: Empty scaffold for user overrides, temporary fixes, and third-party integration. All rules require inline documentation explaining the exception.

nodes.label: Color Design Tokens
nodes.description: Color tokens organized as neutral scale (gray), brand scale (blue by default), status scales (green/red/yellow), and semantic aliases (text-primary, background-brand, border-default, etc.).

nodes.label: Spacing Design Tokens
nodes.description: Even-numbered space scale: 0.25rem to 4rem (space-1 through space-16). Gaps filled by odd numbers (3, 5) for fine-tuning.

nodes.label: Typography Design Tokens
nodes.description: Font family (sans, mono), purpose-named font sizes (display, title, heading, subtitle, body, caption, overline), font weights (regular to bold), and line heights (tight, base, loose).

nodes.label: token-schema.json
nodes.description: JSON schema defining all MCSS tokens, categories, utility classes, layer rules, and RDFa configuration. Single source of truth for validation and utility generation.

nodes.label: src/mcss.css
nodes.description: Entry point that imports tokens first, then all 5 layers in cascade order using PostCSS @import with layer() directives.

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.description: npm package configuration for @mcss/framework with exports for dist CSS, source, and ESLint plugin. Bin entry for mcss-validate CLI.

nodes.label: postcss.config.js
nodes.description: PostCSS config using postcss-import, postcss-preset-env (stage 3 with nesting, custom media, cascade layers), and cssnano for production minification.

nodes.label: postcss-import
nodes.description: PostCSS plugin that resolves @import statements and bundles CSS into a single file.

nodes.label: postcss-preset-env
nodes.description: PostCSS plugin enabling Stage 3+ CSS features: nesting, @layer, custom media queries, :is(). Handles vendor prefixes via browserslist.

nodes.label: cssnano
nodes.description: CSS minification plugin used only for .min.css production output.

nodes.label: Utility Layer Generator Script
nodes.description: Node.js script (scripts/generate-utilities.js) that reads token-schema.json and auto-generates src/layers/utility.css with single-property !important utility classes.

nodes.label: RDFa Vocabulary Definition
nodes.description: Turtle-format RDF vocabulary defining mcs:Component class, mcs:Atom/Molecule/Organism taxonomy, and properties (taxonomyLevel, purpose, hasPart, componentName).

nodes.label: HtmlValidator
nodes.description: CLI validator class using htmlparser2 for HTML well-formedness, RDFa completeness, vocabulary validation, hasPart relationship integrity, and basic accessibility checks (labels, alt text).

nodes.label: CssValidator
nodes.description: CLI validator class using PostCSS AST for magic number detection, token existence checks, and ONC compliance verification.

nodes.label: LayerValidator
nodes.description: CLI validator class enforcing Golden Rule (no margin on c-* root selectors), layer integrity (no !important below utility), and utility single-property rule.

nodes.label: SemanticValidator
nodes.description: CLI validator class for hasPart relationship integrity using pattern matching rather than full RDF store.

nodes.label: TerminalReporter
nodes.description: Formatted CLI output with per-check PASS/FAIL, file:line:message violations, and compliance score (0-100%). Uses chalk for color output.

nodes.label: @mcss/no-magic-numbers
nodes.description: ESLint rule catching hard-coded CSS values (px, rem, em, hex, rgb) not using var() tokens. Applies to CSS files and inline JSX style objects.

nodes.label: @mcss/token-defined
nodes.description: ESLint rule ensuring var() calls only reference tokens defined in token-schema.json.

nodes.label: @mcss/golden-rule
nodes.description: ESLint rule ensuring c-* component root selectors never declare margin in CSS-in-JS template literals.

nodes.label: @mcss/onc-compliance
nodes.description: ESLint rule ensuring classes use correct layer prefixes: l- for layout, c- for components, u- for utilities.

nodes.label: @mcss/require-rdfa
nodes.description: ESLint rule ensuring MCSS components in JSX declare typeof='mcs:Component' and property='mcs:taxonomyLevel'.

nodes.label: @mcss/require-data-state
nodes.description: ESLint rule detecting class-based state modifiers (--disabled, --loading) that should use data-state attributes instead.

nodes.label: c-button
nodes.description: Button atom with primary/secondary/outline/ghost variants via data-variant and loading/disabled/error states via data-state.

nodes.label: c-input
nodes.description: Text input atom for forms with disabled and error states.

nodes.label: c-badge
nodes.description: Status indicator atom with success/warning/error/info/neutral states.

nodes.label: c-card
nodes.description: Card molecule with __header, __body, __footer, __image elements and elevated variant. Composes text, button, image atoms.

nodes.label: c-search-form
nodes.description: Search form molecule with __input and __button elements. Composes c-input and c-button.

nodes.label: c-login-form
nodes.description: Login form molecule with __field, __submit, __recovery elements. Composes c-label, c-input, c-button, c-link.

nodes.label: c-alert
nodes.description: Alert molecule with __icon, __content, __dismiss elements and info/success/warning/error states.

nodes.label: c-navigation
nodes.description: Navigation molecule with __list, __item, __link elements and horizontal/vertical variants.

nodes.label: c-tooltip
nodes.description: Tooltip atom with __content element and top/bottom/left/right positions via data-position.

nodes.label: c-progress
nodes.description: Progress bar atom with determinate (0-100%) and indeterminate states using --mcss-progress-value CSS variable.

nodes.label: .login-container
nodes.description: Custom flexbox layout class for full-page centered login with responsive direction switching. Created where MCSS lacked suitable layout utility.

nodes.label: .login-card
nodes.description: Custom card-style container extending MCSS c-card with additional padding, border-radius, and shadow for the login form.

nodes.label: .social-btn
nodes.description: Custom circular social login button class created because MCSS does not provide circular button styles or icon button variants.

nodes.label: Missing Responsive Utilities
nodes.description: MCSS lacks Tailwind-equivalent responsive utility classes (lg:flex-row, sm:max-w-sm, hidden, block) and breakpoint-based composition helpers.

nodes.label: Missing Spacing Granularity
nodes.description: MCSS provides fewer spacing utility classes than Tailwind, requiring inline styles for precise spacing values not covered by tokens.

nodes.label: Missing Image/Media Block
nodes.description: MCSS does not provide a dedicated media/image block or utility classes for image sizing and object-fit, unlike Tailwind.

nodes.label: Architecture Rules (Immutable)
nodes.description: Six immutable rules: higher layer overrides lower, no external margins on c-*, all values from tokens, correct layer prefix, state via data-state, RDFa declarations required.
